mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
